# Sift Account Defense

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Detect fraud, unify data, and prevent ATO losses from gutting revenue. Bolstered by the largest global network of data in the industry, Sift Account Defense uses real-time insights and unified data to identify trusted and risky users with unparalleled accuracy—so you can stop new attacks before they happen.

Read this one-pager to find out how Sift Account Defense helps businesses:

*   Close data gaps and streamline workflows with easy CIAM integrations
*   Automate fraud detection and block attacks using advanced, AI-powered models
*   Improve decisioning accuracy with ML models, rules, and cohorts precisely tuned to your business needs
*   Increase acceptance rates and support business growth with less friction

### Fight account takeover like Patreon, Turo, and CoinJar.

Download

## Dare to grow differently.

Flip the switch on fraud-fueled fear. Make risk work for your business and scale securely into new markets with Sift’s AI-powered platform.
